title: Saudi Arabian Lamb Skillet
description: A flavorful and aromatic dish from Saudi Arabia, made with lamb and cooked in a skillet. This recipe is perfect for a special occasion or a casual dinner.
instructions: Heat the buttery oil in the skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the lamb cubes to the skillet and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add salt and black pepper to taste.
Reduce heat to medium-low and cook for an additional 10 minutes, or until the lamb is cooked through.
